violations.text: Beans and ground beef, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC stated food items were made prior day. Food items 58DF during time of inspection. Beans and ground beef voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Knifes were stored between equipment between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
The handwashing sink in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

Food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024
Tiles in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2024
